Bug Report — Rate Limiter: Burst Allowance Not Enforced

Severity: High
Component: tools/rate_limiter.rs
Reported: 2026-04-15

Description:
The burst allowance of 10 calls above the base limit is not being enforced.
When a session exceeds the base limit of 100 calls, the limiter should allow
up to 10 additional burst calls before returning RateLimitExceeded. Instead,
it returns the error immediately at call 101, ignoring the burst setting.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Set RATE_LIMIT_MAX_CALLS=5 and RATE_LIMIT_BURST=2
2. Send 7 rapid tool calls in one session
3. Observe: call 6 returns RateLimitExceeded (expected: call 8)

Root cause:
The burst_allowance field is read from config at startup but never applied
in the check_and_record() hot path. The comparison uses max_calls directly
instead of max_calls + burst_allowance.

Fix: Update check_and_record() to compare against max_calls + burst_allowance.
